name: Klimvest PLC
summary: Klimvest PLC does not have significant operations. It was previously engaged in the development and distribution of productivity software for training, support, and translation of or on ERP applications. The company was formerly known as Assima PLC and changed its name to Klimvest PLC in January 2020. Klimvest PLC was founded in 2002 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
